## 🚦 STATUS: **OFF TRACK** (Pre-Rio baseline — expected)

This is pre-inflection point. Revenue is running at ~10% of the ₱1.29M/week target. This is the **baseline without Rio**. The strategy is intact — the entire Q3 target activates from Rio Phase 2, not organic growth.

**Rio signs Apr 19 (TOMORROW):**
→ Phase 1 immediate: RunRio photographers exclusively on FMS, conversion expected to ~20%
→ Phase 2 (Jul/Aug): Prepay integration ships, conversion hits ~80%, take rate to 45% on Rio events
→ Target activates: ₱5.6M/month FMS Revenue
